title: F025 — Holographic Memory
caption: Each fragment reflects the whole, introducing the whole-in-each-part language used throughout the model.
surroundingTextPreview: The Holographic Brain Purpose This chapter develops the holographic dimension of the FHQCM by exploring distributed memory, whole-in-part patterning, Karl Pribram's holonomic brain theory, David Bohm's implicate order, and the broader hypothesis that consciousness may be structured through layered informational relationships.
